title: Armadillo Drops Scute
description: When you kill an Armadillo, it will drops its scute!
body:
# Armadillo Drops Scute On death --> Armadillos will drop their **scute** with a chance of **25%** _Normally, armadillos do not drop their scute on death_ ##
Questions or issues? -> [discord server](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6) | _or create an issue on github_
